reviews.comment:
El lugar donde paro siempre a la vuelta de la costa a comer. Cualquier sandwich que pidas  es espectacular y los precios convenientes.

(Translated by Google)
This is the place I always stop for lunch on my way back from the coast. Any sandwich you order is amazing and the prices are reasonable.

reviews.comment:
Mucha limpieza pero no tienen comida para vegetarianos
Tuve que ir al restaurante del ACA para que me preparen algo

(Translated by Google)
Very clean, but they don't have vegetarian food. I had to go to the ACA restaurant to get something prepared for me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBNXBYZzd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
El servicio del ACA excelente como en todos lados. Felicitaciones al Sr. de la oficina que me orientó en mí problema con el auto. Lucio y Edgardo (Alberto) unos genios totales, muy cordiales. Muchas gracias por toda la ayuda brindada.
La asistencia al viajero, de 10. ¡¡¡Chapó!!!
Sigan trabajando así.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA service was excellent, as always. Congratulations to the gentleman at the office who helped me with my car problem. Lucio and Edgardo (Alberto) were absolute geniuses, very friendly. Thank you so much for all your help.
The travel assistance was top-notch. Hats off to them!
Keep up the good work!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBOHVDeHR3RRAB
